steps.title: Use the basis clue
steps.content: The passage says later scientists used Nash's key experiments as the basis for investigations that led to the first verified gravitational-wave detection. The blank therefore needs a word for work that supports later development.

steps.title: Name the role of the work
steps.content: Choice B would make the work merely additional, Choice C would make it repetitive, and Choice D would make it unsuccessful. The passage instead presents Nash's experiments as the basis for later research. The answer is A.
